name: cryptocurrency-digital_assets
description: This project registers the official African Leadership University (ALU) logo on a local Ethereum blockchain and tokenises fractional ownership of that asset. `ALUAssetRegistry` is an ERC-721 NFT contract that stores the logo's SHA-256 content hash and registration metadata on-chain. `ALULogoToken` is an ERC-20 contract that represents 1,000,000 ownership shares of the logo, which the university can distribute to stakeholders.
